programme.desc: Valerie Cherish stars in a sitcom written by artificial intelligence, which presents her with bizarre challenges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Uncut Gems
programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean Potter finds joy and escape through his early success at extreme climbing, where he connects with a community of like-minded people seeking the sport's freedom and adrenaline; Dean's restless energy compels him to pioneer new ascents and forge new world records, even while at times falling afoul of the establishment and struggling with personal relationships.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A few years after high school, Rue's debts finally catch up with her; hoping to finance her dream wedding, Cassie tries to become internet famous, to the disapproval of Nate, who's juggling the demands of running Cal's business.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Date Night
programme.desc: Dragged down by the daily grind, suburbanites Phil (Steve Carell) and Claire (Tina Fey) try to invigorate their marriage by visiting a trendy Manhattan bistro. They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher

programme.title: Euphoria

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.
